reasoning_content: We need to check if 8927 is prime. Quick sanity check: check divisibility by small primes. 8927 is odd, not divisible by 2. Sum of digits: 8+9+2+7=26, not divisible by 3. Last digit not 0 or 5, so not divisible by 5. Check 7: 7*1275=8925, remainder 2, so not divisible by 7. Check 11: alternating sum: 8-9+2-7 = -6, not multiple of 11. Check 13: 13*686=8918, remainder 9; 13*687=8931, too high. So not divisible by 13. Check 17: 17*525=8925, remainder 2; 17*526=8942, too high. Check 19: 19*470=8930, remainder -3, so 19*469=8911, remainder 16? Actually 19*470=8930, so 8927 is 3 less, so not divisible. Check 23: 23*388=8924, remainder 3; 23*389=8947. Check 29: 29*307=8903, remainder 24; 29*308=8932. Check 31: 31*288=8928, remainder -1, so 31*287=8897, remainder 30. Not divisible. Check 37: 37*241=8917, remainder 10; 37*242=8954. Check 41: 41*217=8897, remainder 30; 41*218=8938. Check 43: 43*207=8901, remainder 26; 43*208=8944. Check 47: 47*190=8930, remainder -3; 47*189=8883, remainder 44. Check 53: 53*168=8904, remainder 23; 53*169=8957. Check 59: 59*151=8909, remainder 18; 59*152=8968. Check 61: 61*146=8906, remainder 21; 61*147=8967. Check 67: 67*133=8911, remainder 16; 67*134=8978. Check 71: 71*125=8875, remainder 52; 71*126=8946. Check 73: 73*122=8906, remainder 21; 73*123=8979. Check 79: 79*113=8927? Let's compute 79*113: 80*113=9040 minus 113=8927? Actually 80*113=9040, subtract 113 gives 8927. Yes! 79 * 113 = 8927. So 8927 is composite. Also note 113 is prime? But we have factors. So answer: 8927 = 79 * 113, not prime.
